overview: MA Herb Business Manager is a multi-tenant business management platform for herbal product distributors. It supports multiple businesses operating in isolation with profile-keyed data, role-based access (Super Admin, Admin, Sub-Admin), warehouse-scoped inventory management, FIFO costing, customer management, and per-profile branding.
features: Multi-tenant business profiles with unique profile key isolation
Three-tier role hierarchy: Super Admin, Admin, Sub-Admin
Warehouse-based inventory location assignment and movement
Full customer management with duplicate detection on quick-add
Customer-linked sales with mandatory customer selection
Per-profile branding: logo upload and theme color customization
Super-Admin monitoring dashboard for all profiles and storage
KPI dashboard with charts and volume points tracking
Purchase orders and receipt generation with WhatsApp sharing
